name: python3-pluginbase
title: python3-pluginbase
summary: Support library for building plugins systems (Python 3)
description:
Support library for building plugins systems (Python 3)
This package contains a module that enables the development of flexible plugin
systems in Python.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
